aboutHoldingDesc: A group of technology companies building digital infrastructure for Uzbekistan’s public and private sectors. Our mission is to make services fast, transparent, and accessible.
careerDesc: We build digital infrastructure that transforms public services and processes in Uzbekistan. Join a team working on national-scale projects.
digitalTransformation2: Digital transformation of public and commercial services in Uzbekistan
createDigitalFuture: We create digital solutions that simplify government and commercial services
digitalizationOfPublicServicesDesc: Comprehensive solutions for digital transformation of government agencies and services
intelligentSystemsAndAnalyticsDesc: AI solutions and intelligent data processing for public and commercial sectors
digitalInfrastructureDesc: Design and implementation of national-scale technological infrastructure
contactUsToDiscuss: Contact us to discuss joint projects and digital solutions
contactYouShortly: Fill out the form and we will contact you shortly
name: Name
weBelieve: We believe technology should serve people. Every project we build is aimed at making interaction with government services simple, fast, and convenient.
clickToYear: Click on a year to learn more
managementDesc: Information will be added later — structure is provided below
foundingCompanyDesc: Start of operations in digital solutions for Uzbekistan’s public sector
foundingCompanyDetail: The company was founded on June 27, 2022. The main focus is the development of digital solutions to automate public services and simplify citizen interaction.
firstProjectDesc: Launch of the first major digital public service projects
firstProjectDetail: An online application system was developed for the Ministry of Internal Affairs, allowing citizens to submit documents electronically.
expensionDirectionsDesc: Development of intelligent systems and analytics platforms
expensionDirectionsDetail: New digital services were launched, including SafeRoad and other platforms.
governmentPrivatePartnershipDesc: Strategic partnerships with government agencies were established
governmentPrivatePartnershipDetail: A cooperation agreement was signed with the Ministry of Internal Affairs.
formationHoldingDesc: Projects and companies were объединены into a single holding structure
formationHoldingDetail: A holding was formed, combining digital services, AI systems, and infrastructure projects.
ecoStickerDesc: This approach enables efficient traffic management, reduces harmful emissions, and helps create a healthier urban environment.
ecoStickerDetail: A comprehensive system designed to improve urban environmental conditions and reduce the negative impact of vehicles on air quality. As part of the project, the city is divided into “green”, “yellow”, and “red” zones based on environmental load levels.
infrastructureDevelopmentDesc: Entering a new stage with AI technology implementation
nationalScaleProjectsDesc: We build technologies for public services used by millions
strongTeamDesc: Experts in IT, analytics, and project management
growthAndDevelopmentDesc: Gain unique experience by working on complex projects
modernWorkEnvironmentDesc: Flexible processes and a professional growth environment
teamDesc: A team of engineers, analysts, and architects
becomePartDesc: Participate in projects transforming digital infrastructure
dragFile: Drag and drop a file or click to upload
portfolioDesc: A portfolio of digital solutions for public and commercial sectors
transportRegistrationSystemDesc: A fully digital system for registering cars and motorcycles
ecosystemDesc: We value long-term partnerships and mutual trust
governmentDesc: Strategic technology partner for leading government organizations of Uzbekistan
softwareEngineerDesc: Development and support of high-load systems
